name: Sesame Cookies (Banh Me)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F, and line two cookie sheets with parchment paper.
2. Grind half a cup of toasted sesame seeds; save the remaining for garnish.
3. Combine ground seeds, sifted flour, baking powder, and baking soda.
4. In a mixing bowl, cream shortening and sugar until fluffy.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each egg until the mixture is again fluffy.
6. Add vanilla, then add dry ingredients gradually, mixing well.
7. Dust a pastry board or work surface with flour; knead dough until it forms a smooth ball.
8. Form cookies by rolling about tablespoon of dough into a ball, flattening slightly, and placing them about 2 inches apart on ungreased baking sheets.
9. Brush cookies with egg wash, then gently press in reserved sesame seeds.
10. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes until lightly browned.
11. Remove from sheets and cool. Enjoy!
